title: Spirity Optimized
description: A lightweight Fabric optimization and PvP utility modpack focused on FPS, smooth gameplay, and low-end performance.
body:
Spirity Optimized

Spirity Optimized is a lightweight Fabric modpack designed for better FPS, smoother gameplay, and useful PvP/QoL improvements.

Features

- High FPS optimization
- Low-end PC/mobile friendly
- PvP utility improvements
- Better zoom and HUD
- Improved rendering performance
- Clean Fabric setup

Included Mods

- Sodium
- Lithium
- FerriteCore
- ModernFix
- ImmediatelyFast
- More Culling
- Zoomify
- AppleSkin
- Mod Menu
- EntityCulling
- And more

Compatibility

- Minecraft 1.21+
- Fabric Loader

Credits

All mods belong to their respective creators.
